data.body: In src/lib/settings.ts: remove OPENROUTER_SELECTED_AGENT_ID and resolveSelectedOpenRouterAgentConfig(). Add resolveOpenRouterAgents() returning virtual agents per openrouter.agents entry. Update getActionAgent(), getStepAgent(), pool resolution. In src/lib/openrouter.ts: replace single-model helpers with OPENROUTER_AGENT_PREFIX and multi-agent helpers.
data.title: Settings resolution: multi-agent virtual agents
